# Streamlit Community Cloud / HF Spaces reads requirements.txt to provision
# the runtime. This file is autogenerated from uv.lock (psycopg pruned because
# the deployed demo is SQLite-only). Regenerate when bumping deps:
#
#     uv export --format requirements.txt --no-dev --extra ui \
#         --no-emit-project --no-hashes --no-annotate --no-header \
#         --prune psycopg > requirements.txt
#
# A CI guard (tests/scripts/test_requirements_pinned.py) refuses drift between
# requirements.txt and uv.lock.
